steps.t: Dornach can be found along the road to the north of Aelin Veren in North Ithilien. Dornach has asked you to sit near him, so he can blindfold you for …
Dornach is leading you to the hidden refuge of Henneth Annûn.
Dornach can be found within Henneth Annûn. Dornach has led you to the hidden refuge of Henneth Annûn. You should now speak to him.
